name: Potetboller (Norwegian Potato Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil for deep frying.
2. Add boiling water to the instant mashed potatoes.
3. Mix in finely minced anchovy fillets, flour, parsley, salt, mustard, pepper, and mace.
4. Form into walnut-sized balls.
5. Coat each ball with beaten egg yolk.
6. Bread each ball with bread crumbs.
7. Deep fry in hot oil (375F) a few at a time until golden brown.
4 servings
